title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
